cases.title: A fact already surfaced this session is suppressed next turn

seed.statement: The docker socket is mounted read-only; use the provided wrapper, not raw docker run.

turns.prompt: start a docker container for the worker
now docker exec into it to check logs

cases.note: The same 'docker' cue fires on both turns, but after the fact is surfaced in turn 1 it is habituated: turn 2 must stay silent unless the activation is materially stronger. Prevents the same hint nagging every turn.
